rows.command_eng: Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.
Add 5 minutes to the oven.
Start the rice cooker on cooking mode for 30 minutes.
Set the living room light to yellow.
Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
Set the brightness of the living room light to 80%.
If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.
Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.
When the contact sensor is detected, turn on the light.
When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.
Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
If the temperature is 28 degrees or higher and the humidity is 70% or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode and 24 degrees.
If the carbon dioxide concentration is 1200ppm or higher and person is being detected, set the air purifier to high mode and announce a warning using the speaker.
If it is raining and the humidity is 80% or higher, set the dehumidifier to drying mode and output "It's raining and himidity is high" through the speaker.
Every 10 minutes, if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode.
Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.
Lock the doorlock every day at midnight.
Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
Every 30 minutes, toggle the living room air purifier between sleep mode and auto mode.
Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.

rows.command_eng: Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.
Add 5 minutes to the oven.
Start the rice cooker on cooking mode for 30 minutes.
Set the living room light to yellow.
Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
Set the brightness of the living room light to 80%.
If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.
Stop charging if the voltage is 220V or higher.
If the cloud service is activated, upload test.png file to the cloud.
When the contact sensor is detected, turn on the light.
When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.
Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
If the temperature is 28 degrees or higher and the humidity is 70% or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode and 24 degrees.
If the carbon dioxide concentration is 1200ppm or higher and person is being detected, set the air purifier to high mode and announce a warning using the speaker.
If it is raining and the humidity is 80% or higher, set the dehumidifier to drying mode and output "It's raining and himidity is high" through the speaker.
Every 10 minutes, if the temperature is 30 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to cool mode.
Every 30 minutes, if the temperature is 20 degrees or higher and below 30 degrees, set the air conditioner to auto mode; if it is 30 degrees or higher, set it to cool mode.
Lock the doorlock every day at midnight.
Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
Every 30 minutes, toggle the living room air purifier between sleep mode and auto mode.
Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.
